text:
is a first year student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Hannah is a short girl with a small build. She has long light hair tied back with a hair tie, and freckles on her cheeks.

Personality

She is a half shy girl with other people, but above all, she tends to relate and be closer to Franz than to the rest of the people.

Story

Hannah begins her first year of Junior high, where she is always together with what could be her "boyfriend" Franz, Mikasa polls her about what she thinks of Eren Yeager to her and Franz, to which she replies that Eren can probably be a good person.

In the days that followed, she is seen talking mostly to Franz, saying sweet things to each other. In addition to that, she would later join the arts club.
